code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut count = 0
mut in_word = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if in_word
        count = count + 1
      end
      in_word = false
    else
      in_word = true
    end
  when None
    in_word = in_word
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_word
  count = count + 1
end
println("#{count}")
